end;(getgenv())[IH[WH("\210$\240\216\247\001#\252\249",16781511417664-(1037824+-587456))]]=F local function i()if writefile then local F,T=pcall(function()return b:JSONEncode(_G[IH[WH("p\024\rh\023\014\021\238\180}\019\237",2750926550720-(-2368))]])end)if F then writefile(o,T)end end end local function W()if isfile and isfile(o)then local F=readfile(o)local T,U=pcall(function()return b:JSONDecode(F)end)if T and type(U)==IH[WH("\142\237\147\178\249",2677911654592-(-454464))]then end function HopServer()local function aF(F)local T=AF[F]or AF[-448960+(897537-448576)]local U={}for F,T in ipairs(T)do table[IH[WH("\131\005\179\194\157\002",20133733048384-106560)]](U,T[IH[WH("Q\169\204\248",-614080+12194486509248)]])end return U end local function YF(F,T)local U=AF[T]or AF[49857-49856]for T,U in ipairs(U)do if U[IH[WH("h\019\203l",26799523182464-997248)]]==F then return U[IH[WH("]\128",342528+5495410312704)]]end end return nil end local function pF(F)for T,U in pairs(workspace:GetDescendants())do if U[IH[WH("h\224\\\248",-493312+24221468559104)]]==F and U:FindFirstChild(IH[WH("b\014\248\244\181\001\249\171\238\029\252\233\220\017\236\\",18423262648192-432000)])then return U end end local U:FindFirstChild(IH[WH("b\248\168\244\237\001\250\243\177\029\000\003\220\017\185\249",9269613289280-122688)])then return U end end end return nil end local function tF(F)return QF[F]or function KF(F)local T,U=pcall(function()return Enum[IH[WH("[\"\020\202,\245\228",7536593176512-(-686144))]][F]end)return T and U or nil end local function VF()local F=q[IH[WH("f%\249\017\003\002\017\240\v",27319213824256-(1311040-714816))]]local T=F and F:FindFirstChildOfClass(IH[WH("\240\189\248\2387\001\250H",25927643590400-(-233728))])if not F or not T then return false end if T[IH[WH("b\029\207\231\219\244",423680+14751064754432)]]<=-134848-(-134848)then return false end if T:GetState()==Enum[IH[WH("b\177\016\244\r\001k)\254\225\237\019\241Xa\247U",23400055928064-357632)]][IH[WH("\254!\252\228",21018497017024-812224)]]then return false end local U=F:FindFirstChild(IH[WH("L-\251\004\244\018\151",22728967449728-519296)])if U and U:FindFirstChild(IH[WH("\025\001\001\249",22524956479488-(-405632+(157312+(-407168+1151104))))])then return false end return true end local function mF(F)local T=q[IH[WH("\221%\249a\239\246q\241\205",11710229019136-686592)]]if not T then return nil end for T,U in ipairs(T:GetChildren())do if U:IsA(IH[WH("n\r\182\253",26604100286784-(-886464))])then if F==nil then return U end if U[IH[WH("\030\027\000\194\232\021\001",(79616-979456)+25413322390272)]]==F then return U end end end return nil end local function eF(F)local T={q[IH[WH("\\\031\002\202\005\241\255\204",-542656+(13945759996800-644032))]],q[IH[WH("]\030\001\017w\002\017\232\r",(-797888-(-895360))+11059540689728)]]}for T,U in ipairs(T)do if U then for T,U in ipairs(U:GetChildren())do if U:IsA(IH[WH("n\254\128\253",9378060816576-(-274240))])and U[IH[WH("e\027\000\238`\021\a",7425997635968-((1492480-785984)+(-585664-939648)))]]==F then return U end end end end return nil end function Skill(F)if not VF()then return end local T=KF(F)if not T U=game:GetService(IH[WH("f\147\t\241\001\230\231\221q\002\005\214\208\212\141\243\006\018\136",25187834739904-(-967488))])U:SendKeyEvent(true,T,false,game)task[IH[WH("\145\234\165{",900480+16228533027456)]](.08)U:SendKeyEvent(false,T,false,game)end
